hypothesis: sign(net dealer GEX) at open partitions days into mean-reverting (positive gamma) vs trending (negative gamma); may explain #1 recency drawdown OR give the dead Iron Condor a selection rule
test_plan: compute/proxy GEX, label ~365 backtest days by gamma sign, split vwap_continuation + condor OOS by label, compare expectancy + L172 null

hypothesis: defined-risk 0DTE premium sold the morning of FOMC/CPI/NFP captures post-print IV collapse big enough to beat the strike-null that killed the ambient-regime condor; edge = timing the vol event, not picking the strike
test_plan: reuse backtest/lib/simulator_credit.py + backtest/lib/multileg_structures.py; restrict to event days; price condor/fly; compare vs non-event days AND random-strike null AND directional event-day P&L

topic: Conformal / changepoint gating for recency-drawdown HOLD
hypothesis: online changepoint (BOCPD) or conformal band over rolling per-trade P&L beats the hand-tuned ~2.2sigma recency heuristic — fewer false HOLDs and false GREENs
test_plan: survey libs via Context7+PyPI (no hand-roll); replay #1 equity curve through BOCPD vs current heuristic; count correct HOLD vs trade decisions retrospectively
